ddls:
CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "doc_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document type was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the document type */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attr_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "doc_type_id" TEXT /* ID of the document type the attribute belongs to */,
  "attr_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attr_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "version_nbr" INTEGER /* Version number of the attribute */,
  "sort_cd" TEXT /* Sort code for the attribute */,
  "active_ind" TEXT /* Activation indicator for the attribute (Y/N) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., text, date, number) */,
  "required_ind" TEXT /* Required indicator for the attribute (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_definitions" (
  "attr_defn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute definition */,
  "attr_id" TEXT /* ID of the attribute the definition belongs to */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_defn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_definitions_attr_id FOREIGN KEY ("attr_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "obj_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "obj_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_attributes" (
  "obj_attr_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each object attribute */,
  "obj_type_id" TEXT /* ID of the object type the attribute belongs to */,
  "attr_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attr_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "version_nbr" INTEGER /* Version number of the attribute */,
  "sort_cd" TEXT /* Sort code for the attribute */,
  "active_ind" TEXT /* Activation indicator for the attribute (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_attr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_attributes_obj_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("obj_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "doc_ver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_type_id" TEXT /* ID of the document type the version belongs to */,
  "version_nbr" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "document" TEXT /* The document itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_ver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "obj_ver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object version */,
  "obj_type_id" TEXT /* ID of the object type the version belongs to */,
  "version_nbr" INTEGER /* Version number of the object */,
  "object" TEXT /* The object itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the object version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the object version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_ver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_obj_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("obj_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_search" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "doc_type_id" TEXT /* ID of the document type the search result belongs to */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_search_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id")
)
